description: Alice can create a precise Lambda function, pass an admin-equivalent Lambda execution role, and the target role trusts lambda.amazonaws.com.

ground_truth.reasoning: Alice has lambda:CreateFunction and iam:PassRole permissions, the target role trusts Lambda, and the target role has AdministratorAccess.

assertion_strategy: The benchmark wrapper asserts the Lambda CreateFunction edge, exact PassRole edge, Lambda service trust edge, validated critical passrole_lambda finding, zero blocked/inconclusive/precondition_only target findings, no blockers on the validated target finding, and PASS states for the required Lambda PassRole checks.
